Name Type Description
req Object Express request object

if the request is invalid or if an error occurs during validation

Error

the validated token payload

Object

(async) createToolToken(consumer_key, data) → {string}

Create Tool JWT Token to send to client
Parameters:
Name Type Description
consumer_key Object the tool consumer key
data Object the data to include in the token
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 350
Throws:
if the consumer key is not found or if there is an error signing the token
Type
Error
Returns:
the signed token
Type
string

(async) getAccessToken(consumer_key, scopes) → {string|null}

Get an access token for the given LTI consumer
Parameters:
Name Type Description
consumer_key string the key of the consumer
scopes string the scopes to request
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 230
Returns:
a string containing the access token or null unable to get token
Type
string | null

Name Type Description

(async) sendDeepLinkResponse(res, data, return_url, consumer_key) → {Object}

Send Deep Link Response
Parameters:
Name Type Description
res Object the Express response object
data Object the data to include in the response
return_url string the URL to send the response to
consumer_key string the key of the consumer to get an access token for
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 496
Throws:
if the request fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the response from the LMS
Type
Object

(async) sendRegistrationResponse(config, endpoint, consumer, token) → {Object}

Send Dynamic Registration Response
Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
config Object the registration data to send to the LMS
endpoint string the registration endpoint to send the data to
consumer Object the consumer object containing client_id and deployment_id to update after successful registration
token string | null null an optional access token to include in the request for platforms that require it
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 377
Throws:
if the registration fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the response from the LMS

Object
